name: ebenova-scope-guard
description: AI-powered contract scope enforcement for freelancers and agencies. Detects scope creep in client messages, generates professional pushback responses, and creates formal change orders.

tools.name: analyze_scope_creep
tools.description: Analyze a client message for scope violations against original contract terms

tools.name: generate_change_order
tools.description: Generate a formal change order document for out-of-scope work

tools.name: generate_legal_document
tools.description: Generate a professional legal document (NDA, contract, agreement)

tools.name: extract_from_conversation
tools.description: Extract project requirements and scope from a conversation thread

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check your API key usage and remaining quota
